description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, with graphic print on the front, short sleeves and embroidered logo towards hemlineFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoLook pretty and feminine in this white tee from adidas. The delicate nature inspired graphic with silvery specks comes alive with the sihouettes of birds and plants. Team this with denim shorts, mini skirts and adidas shoes for casual outings with friends.Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
